context.projectOverview: Architect Decision Lens Panel — Sprint 2 (the riskiest): refactor the monolithic runArchitect so Checkpoint 2 (approach selection) becomes a discrete seam. Panel ON (architect.panel.enabled && lenses>=2): generate candidate approaches, fan out one lens scorer per lens bounded by maxConcurrent, synthesize() a ranked winner, select it. Panel OFF: today's single monolithic runAgenticLoop, byte-identical.

completedSprints.title: synthesize() + arch-lenses + architect.panel config
completedSprints.summary: src/orchestrator/workflow/synthesizer.ts (pure synthesize(approaches, lensScores) -> SynthesisResult {winner, ranking, graftedIdeas, dissent}); src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.ts (resolveArchLensFocus over 6 lenses + fallback); architect.panel config via architect: ArchitectSectionSchema.optional() in schema.ts. IMPORTANT: architect is OPTIONAL — read the gate as config.architect?.panel and treat undefined as off. Commit 7de08b5.

gitNote: Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist. Stage ONLY: git add src/orchestrator/architect-agent.ts src/orchestrator/architect-agent.test.ts. NEVER `git add -A`/`git add .`. CRITICAL: the OFF path (config.architect?.panel undefined/disabled OR lenses<2) must run the EXISTING single monolithic runAgenticLoop byte-identically — the panel branch is purely additive and gated. Mock createClient AND runAgenticLoop in tests (the evaluator-agent.test.ts harness is the model). Branch bober/architect-lens-panel — never main.
